name: higgs-audio
description: High-quality multilingual TTS + music generation. Supports zero-shot voice cloning from short reference clips. GPU strongly recommended; Mac Intel unsupported (no recent PyTorch wheels).

macos-arm64.notes: MPS works for inference but slower than CUDA; not all models supported.

macos-x86_64.notes: PyTorch dropped Intel-Mac wheels after 2.2.x; higgs-audio requires newer torch.

macos: cd $INSTALL_DIR && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
linux: cd $INSTALL_DIR && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 -r requirements.txt
windows: cd $INSTALL_DIR; python -m venv venv; .\venv\Scripts\activate; pip install --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 -r requirements.txt
